message:
test(proptest): add 15 property tests for AuditChain types and behavioral invariants

- 5 serde roundtrip tests: AuditEntryKind, AuditChainConfig, AuditChainTelemetry,
  AuditChainTelemetrySnapshot, ChainVerificationResult
- 10 behavioral tests: from_config capacity clamping, append/telemetry consistency,
  eviction arithmetic, monotonic sequences, chain verification without eviction,
  records_allows flag, entries_by_kind partitioning, export_json/jsonl parse-back

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
